name: Atwell on Spring
bathroomsNote: 1-2 bathrooms depending on unit; specific bath count per floor plan not confirmed

notes.unitSqFt: 489–1,539 sq ft across all unit types
notes.doormanEvidence: Multiple listing sources describe '24/7 concierge' and 'around-the-clock concierge services'; residents confirm concierge team availability
notes.balconyEvidence: Listing aggregators list patio/balcony as an amenity; residents mention balcony views in reviews
notes.packageRoomEvidence: Package receiving listed as amenity; one review notes package room can be disorganized
notes.wellMaintainedCaveat: At least one resident (summer 2025) reported a rat infestation; reviews overall mixed (4.1/5 on ApartmentRatings from 14 reviews); property is new (2024) so limited long-term data
notes.unitClimateCaveat: In-unit vs building HVAC control not confirmed in any source reviewed
notes.currentSpecial: 1 month base rent free on 1BR units (as of June 2026)
